title: 3Powers supported dependency versions (dependencies.yaml)
description: Supported third-party version ranges 3Powers is known-good against. `3pwr deps-check` probes installed versions and reports drift. A preflight check, never a verdict gate.

components.description: The probed components and their supported ranges.

probe.description: Shell command whose output carries the installed version.

known_good.description: A specific version known to work well (informational).

adapter.description: Language adapter this component belongs to (e.g. python, go); omit for global tooling.

on_drift.description: Policy on drift/absence: warn (surface, default), block (fail deps-check), ignore (never blocks, still shown).
